name: Apimeds Pharmaceuticals US, Inc.
business: Apimeds Pharmaceuticals US, Inc. is a development-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the clinical development of Apitox, a purified honeybee venom-based drug candidate for treating pain and inflammation associated with knee osteoarthritis, and also operates a digital asset segment through its subsidiary MindWave Innovations Inc.

exposures.sentence: Our primary focus is the clinical development of Apitox, a purified honeybee venom-based drug candidate being evaluated for the treatment of acute pain and inflammation associated with knee osteoarthritis.
As a result of the Merger, the Company became a dual-segment operating company, adding a digital asset operations segment alongside our core biopharmaceutical business.

catalysts.event: File Charter Amendment to effect Reverse Stock Split and Change in Par Value
catalysts.sentence: Following the expiration of the Waiting Period, or March 25, 2026, the Company expects to file the Charter Amendment with the Secretary of State of the State of Delaware to effect the Reverse Stock Split and the Change in Par Value.

tamClaims.claim: Osteoarthritis therapeutics market size $8.28 billion in 2022, expected $20.24 billion by 2032
tamClaims.sentence: According to Precedence Research the osteoarthritis therapeutics market size accounted for $8.28 billion in 2022 and it is expected to hit around $20.24 billion by 2032, expanding at a CAGR of 9.4% from 2023 to 2032.

tamClaims.claim: Multiple sclerosis market size $10.73 billion in 2022, expected $24.4 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: According to Pharmaceutical Technology the MS market size in the United States accounted for $10.73 billion in 2022 and is expected to hit $24.4 billion by 2030, expanding at a CAGR of 10.32%.
